ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to memorie de` signori Accademici Gelati, he was also member of the following Academies: Scomposti, Ambigui, Solleciti, Incolti, Illuminati, Anelanti, Invaghiti,
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
